name: cambridge-reader-scraper
description: CLI to inspect and reconstruct Cambridge Reader books

scripts.completions:generate: usage generate completion bash cambridge-reader-scraper -f cambridge-reader-scraper.usage.kdl > completions/cambridge-reader-scraper.bash && usage generate completion zsh cambridge-reader-scraper -f cambridge-reader-scraper.usage.kdl > completions/_cambridge-reader-scraper && usage generate completion fish cambridge-reader-scraper -f cambridge-reader-scraper.usage.kdl > completions/cambridge-reader-scraper.fish && usage generate completion powershell cambridge-reader-scraper -f cambridge-reader-scraper.usage.kdl > completions/cambridge-reader-scraper.ps1 && tsx src/index.ts completion xonsh > completions/cambridge-reader-scraper.xsh
scripts.completions:check: usage generate completion bash cambridge-reader-scraper -f cambridge-reader-scraper.usage.kdl > completions/cambridge-reader-scraper.bash && usage generate completion zsh cambridge-reader-scraper -f cambridge-reader-scraper.usage.kdl > completions/_cambridge-reader-scraper && usage generate completion fish cambridge-reader-scraper -f cambridge-reader-scraper.usage.kdl > completions/cambridge-reader-scraper.fish && usage generate completion powershell cambridge-reader-scraper -f cambridge-reader-scraper.usage.kdl > completions/cambridge-reader-scraper.ps1 && tsx src/index.ts completion xonsh > completions/cambridge-reader-scraper.xsh && git diff --exit-code -- completions
